compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
v0.7.1 released — ALL channels verified at 0.7.1, both automated channels created hands-off by the workflow (Actions run 28806482655):
- PyPI: nava-rebar 0.7.1 live (pypi.org/pypi/nava-rebar/0.7.1/json).
- GitHub Release v0.7.1: marked Latest, author=github-actions[bot] (AUTO-created by the github_release job, NOT manual), assets nava_rebar-0.7.1-{py3-none-any.whl,tar.gz} attached.
- MCP Registry: io.github.navapbc/rebar 0.7.1, isLatest=true (published by the mcp_registry OIDC job — no interactive login).
- Homebrew tap: Formula/rebar.rb url+sha256 bumped to the 0.7.1 sdist, pushed to navapbc/homebrew-rebar (commit 83391e1).
- Smoke test: clean pipx install of nava-rebar[mcp]==0.7.1 (verified Version: 0.7.1) passes end-to-end (init/create/claim/comment/close -> closed, list, fsck, rebar-mcp).
Note: the mcp_registry job failed on first attempt due to a PyPI-propagation race (registry's PyPI validation 404'd right after publish); a re-run of the failed job succeeded once PyPI served 0.7.1. Follow-up: add a short retry/wait to the mcp_registry step.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "v0.7.1 fully released and verified across all four channels (see evidence comment): PyPI 0.7.1, GitHub Release v0.7.1 auto-created by github-actions[bot] + Latest, MCP Registry 0.7.1 isLatest via the OIDC job, Homebrew 0.7.1; smoke test on a clean 0.7.1 install passed. The referencing commit 'Release 0.7.1' (36d4c57e134761d7a4e840db035bd20577b066ab) carries the 'rebar-ticket: 8d1d-941c-9589-4004' trailer and is on origin/main (reachable from this worktree HEAD via git log --grep). Force-closing because the file-impact commit-gate resolves through the tracker symlink to the main checkout, which a parallel session left on a stale branch missing this commit — an environment artifact, not missing work.". Session: aadad0f29.

compiled_state.description:
## What
Cut the **v0.7.1** patch release following `docs/releasing.md`, to fully exercise
the newly-landed release automation end-to-end on a real tag push:
- the fixed `github_release` job (GH_REPO; change 316) auto-creating the GitHub Release, and
- the new `mcp_registry` job (GitHub Actions OIDC; change 319) auto-publishing server.json.
This is the first tagged release AFTER both changes, so it is their first true
production run. v0.7.0's GitHub Release was a manual one-off; v0.7.1 must be fully
hands-off for the automated channels.

## Scope / steps (per docs/releasing.md)
- Bump `pyproject.toml` `version` and `server.json` (`version` + `packages[0].version`) to 0.7.1.
- Land the "Release 0.7.1" bump commit on main through Gerrit (both votes).
- Tag `v0.7.1` and push the tag -> release.yml runs build -> publish (PyPI, OIDC) ->
  github_release (auto GitHub Release) -> mcp_registry (auto MCP Registry, OIDC).
- Update the Homebrew tap (still manual: Formula/rebar.rb url + sha256 for 0.7.1).
- Post-release smoke test against the published artifact.

## Verification note
The github_release and mcp_registry jobs run ONLY on the real v* tag push (not in
Gerrit branch CI), so their success is confirmed by inspecting the Actions run and
the live GitHub/registry state after the tag — recorded as evidence on this ticket.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` reads version 0.7.1.
- [ ] `server.json` reads version 0.7.1 (both top-level and packages[0]).
- [ ] The "Release 0.7.1" bump commit is merged to main via Gerrit.
- [ ] PyPI shows nava-rebar 0.7.1 live.
- [ ] The v0.7.1 GitHub Release was created by the github_release workflow job (not manually).
- [ ] The v0.7.1 GitHub Release is marked Latest.
- [ ] The MCP Registry serves io.github.navapbc/rebar version 0.7.1.
- [ ] The MCP Registry 0.7.1 entry was published by the mcp_registry OIDC job (no interactive login).
- [ ] The Homebrew formula url and sha256 point at the 0.7.1 sdist.
- [ ] The post-release smoke test passes against the published 0.7.1 artifact.
compiled_state.title: Release nava-rebar 0.7.1 — exercise auto GitHub Release + auto MCP Registry (OIDC) end-to-end
